title: Fabric Server Optimization
description: A Fabric server-side optimization modpack. Mods can also be used on client-side but this pack focuses on mods for the server-side.
body:
This is a Fabric server-side optimization modpack. Mods can also be used client side but this pack focused on Server-side/universal mods

List of Mods:
